creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to xxjack12xx from comment #1)
> Can you report this to
> 
> https://wiki.audacityteam.org/wiki/Reporting_Bugs

Was it reported upstream?

I cannot reproduce this myself here on 13.0-CURRENT with audacity-2.3.0_3.
I'm going to close this since there has been no further comment for 4 months
now, the bug occurred on an older version (audacity-2.2.2), and I do not see 
anything actionable with regards to the port here.
